article_theme: The release of InferenceXv2 benchmark results reveals that while AMD's MI355X shows competitive single-node performance, Nvidia's hardware and software stack (GB300 NVL72, TRT-LLM) maintain a dominant lead in complex, multi-node, disaggregated LLM inference setups used by frontier AI labs.
structure_summary: The article opens with an introduction to the InferenceXv2 framework and top-level benchmark results. It then provides a technical primer on crucial inference concepts (Interactivity vs Throughput, TP/EP/DP, MTP, Disaggregated Prefill, WideEP). The core of the piece is a deep dive into specific hardware/software configurations, comparing Nvidia (Hopper/Blackwell) and AMD (MI300/MI325/MI355) across single-node and multi-node setups. It concludes with a TCO analysis and a roadmap for the InferenceX repository.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.section_role: Establishes the article's metadata, key hardware/software subjects, and author credibility.
translation_notes: Retain hardware and software names in English.
Translate 'Disaggregated Serving' to standard industry terminology like '分离式服务' or '解耦服务'.
Translate 'Wide Expert Parallelism' to '宽泛专家并行' or keep 'WideEP' as an acronym with an initial explanation.

sections.title: Introduction
sections.next_section_title: Key Observations and Results to Highlight
sections.section_role: Introduces the InferenceXv2 benchmark framework, emphasizing its open-source, continuous nature compared to traditional benchmarks.
translation_notes: Translate 'point-in-time benchmarks' accurately as '静态/特定时间点的基准测试' to contrast with 'continuous tests'.
Maintain an authoritative yet community-oriented tone.

sections.title: Key Observations and Results to Highlight
sections.next_section_title: Acknowledgments and InferenceX™ (formerly InferenceMAX) Initiative Supporters
sections.section_role: Delivers the core thesis and TL;DR of the entire article regarding the AMD vs. Nvidia competitive landscape.
translation_notes: The slang 'framemog' (total domination/outperforming) must be localized to equivalent Chinese tech slang, such as '全面碾压' or '降维打击'.
Translate 'composability' precisely as '可组合性' or '组合能力' in the context of software stack optimizations.

sections.title: Acknowledgments and InferenceX™ (formerly InferenceMAX) Initiative Supporters
sections.previous_section_title: Key Observations and Results to Highlight
sections.next_section_title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts
sections.section_role: Establishes the scale, legitimacy, and independence of the benchmark by crediting hardware providers.
translation_notes: Ensure professional courtesy in the tone of acknowledgments.
Translate 'Pushing Pareto Frontier' as '拓展帕累托前沿' or '推高帕累托前沿'.

sections.title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts
sections.previous_section_title: Acknowledgments and InferenceX™ (formerly InferenceMAX) Initiative Supporters
sections.section_role: Acts as a navigational signpost, preparing less-technical readers for foundational concepts.
translation_notes: Translate 'primer' as '入门指南' or '基础概念科普'. Keep the tone helpful and instructional.

sections.title: Interactivity vs Throughput Tradeoff
sections.previous_section_title: A Primer on Important Technical Concepts
sections.next_section_title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Defines the fundamental tension in LLM serving and introduces the concept of disaggregation as a solution.
translation_notes: Strict terminology required: 'Interactivity' -> '交互速度' or '响应延迟', 'Throughput' -> '吞吐量', 'TPOT' -> '每个输出Token的时间 (Time Per Output Token)'.
Translate 'Disaggregated prefill' as 'Prefill-Decode分离' or '预填充与解码解耦'.

sections.title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Explains the three primary parallelization strategies and their respective network/compute tradeoffs.
translation_notes: Use established Chinese distributed training terms: 'all-reduce' -> '全量归约' (or keep English), 'all-to-all collective' -> '全对全集合通信', 'shards experts' -> '专家分片'.

sections.title: Tracking Improvements Over Time
sections.previous_section_title: Tensor Parallel, Expert Parallel, Data Parallel (TP, EP, DP)
sections.section_role: Outlines the methodology of the benchmark: tracking rapid software evolution against static hardware.
translation_notes: Translate 'O(yearly) cadence' and 'O(weekly) cadence' as 'O(年)级别周期' and 'O(周)级别周期'. Ensure the Big O notation context is preserved for a hardcore tech audience.

sections.title: DeepSeek R1
sections.section_role: Demonstrates AMD's recent software-driven performance gains using a specific, highly relevant workload (DeepSeek R1).
translation_notes: Translate 'upstreaming' as '合并到上游' or '推送到主分支'.
Translate 'forked' as '分支版本' or '分叉版本'.

sections.title: GPT-OSS 120B
sections.section_role: Shows the benchmark progression for a different model architecture, highlighting where software optimizations hit diminishing returns.
translation_notes: Translate 'marginal improvements' as '边际提升' or '小幅改进'.
Ensure 'AITER' and 'vLLM ROCm image' are kept in English or cleanly transliterated where appropriate.

sections.title: Disaggregated Inference Frameworks
sections.section_role: Details the specific multi-node software stacks used by Nvidia and AMD for the most complex benchmark tests.
translation_notes: Translate 'KV cache offloading' as 'KV缓存卸载'.
Maintain clarity that Dynamo is 'inference-engine agnostic' ('与推理引擎解耦' or '引擎无关').

sections.title: DeepSeek Disagg +WideEP Results Deep Dive
sections.section_role: Presents empirical evidence proving that multi-node disaggregated setups are vastly superior to single-node aggregated ones.
translation_notes: Translate 'aggregated inference' as '聚合推理' or '一体化推理' to contrast with 'disaggregated' (分离式).
Again, translate 'framemogs' with strong slang like '绝对碾压'.

sections.title: Nvidia versus AMD Disagg Prefill
sections.section_role: The climax of the technical argument: a direct, high-stakes comparison of Nvidia's and AMD's best disaggregated setups.
translation_notes: Translate 'Pareto frontier' as '帕累托前沿'.
Ensure the distinction between setups 'with MTP' and 'without MTP' is crystal clear, as it is the crux of the performance comparison.

sections.title: Unpacking Inference Providers’ Unit Economics
sections.next_section_title: Jensen Under Promising and Overdelivering - Hopper vs Blackwell vs Rack Scale NVL72
sections.section_role: Contextualizes the theoretical benchmark limits by analyzing current real-world API provider pricing and performance.
translation_notes: Translate 'Unit Economics' as '单位经济效益'.
Translate 'middle of the pack provider' as '处于中游的提供商' or '表现中等的服务商'.

sections.title: Jensen Under Promising and Overdelivering - Hopper vs Blackwell vs Rack Scale NVL72
sections.section_role: Validates Nvidia's generational hardware claims, refuting skepticism about their marketing numbers.
translation_notes: Translate 'lookmaxxing' (internet slang for maximizing appearance) conceptually as '表面光鲜的包装', '过度美化', or '纯粹的营销噱头'.
Translate 'reality distortion field' literally as '现实扭曲力场' (a well-known tech trope).
Translate 'Jensen Math' as '老黄刀法' or '老黄数学'.

sections.title: Blackwell vs Blackwell Ultra
sections.previous_section_title: Jensen Under Promising and Overdelivering - Hopper vs Blackwell vs Rack Scale NVL72
sections.section_role: Analyzes the latest hardware iteration (Blackwell Ultra), highlighting discrepancies between paper specs and actual performance.
translation_notes: Translate 'On paper' as '纸面数据上' or '理论上'.
Ensure precision when distinguishing between 'FP8' and 'FP4' performance multipliers.
